calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Tax And/Or Strike Costs Claimed By Respondent
Off Calendar Mar-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. GREGORY B. THOMAS OF BOORNAZIAN, JENSEN & GARTHE, TEL. NO. (510)834-4350 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER TODD GELFAND, TRUSTEE OF THE REATA TRUST'S Motion To Tax And/Or Strike Costs Claimed By Respondent is Denied. NAC is the prevailing party for costs purposes per Code of Civil Procedure 1032 and is entitled to costs. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =(302/HEK)

Ntc Of Mtn To Tax Costs; Req. For Judicial Ntc And Pos
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Barry W. Lee, Esq., of Manatt, Phelps & Phillips, LLP, Tel. 415.291.7450, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT NORTH AMERICAN CAPACITY INSURANCE CO.'S Motion To Tax Costs is Denied. Petitioner only seeks costs as to Respondent Paragon. Petitioner was required to name all of the parties to the arbitration as respondents to its petition to confirm arbitration award. (Code of Civil Procedure 1285) Therefore, Petitioner is entitled to recover the costs of that service. (Code of Civil Procedure 1033.5(a)(4)) Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attys' Fee; Memo Of P&A In Support Thereof; Pos
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Barry W. Lee, Esq., of Manatt, Phelps & Phillips, LLP, Tel. 415.291.7450, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER TODD GELFAND'S Motion For Attorney's Fees is Granted in part and denied in part. Petitioner is awarded $25,000. Petitioner is entitled to fees under Code of Civil Procedure 1293.2, and 1033.5(a)(10) and Civil Code 1717(a)). However, the amount sought is unreasonable. $25,000 is a reasonable fee award. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn For Atty'S Fees
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Barry W. Lee, Esq., of Manatt, Phelps & Phillips, LLP, Tel. 415.291.7450, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT NORTH AMERICAN CAPACITY INSURANCE CO.'S Motion For Attorney's Fees is Denied. Civil Code 1717 does not apply as to Respondent North American Capacity and does not entitle it to attorney fees. Although section 1717 has been employed to award attorney fees to prevailing parties even in situations where the contract containing the attorney fees provisions is unenforceable, rescinded, or nonexistent, or where the party sued on a contract is actually a nonsignatory, North American Capacity was not a party to the contract and was not a party to the underlying arbitration action to enforce the contract. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn For Atty'S Fees
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Continued To Mar-22-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER TODD GELFAND, TRUSTEE OF THE REATA TRUST'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.
Appearances: Gregory B. Thomas of Boornazian Jensen & Garthe (510.834.4350)for respondent NACIC; Ann M. Heimberger and Barry W. Lee of Manatt Phelps & Phillips LLP (291.7454) for petitioners.
Argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: the Court confirms the arbitration award. Judgment in favor of petitioner shall be entered against Paragon. The Court dismisses NAC pursuant to CCP 1287.2. Petitioner is not barred from pursuing an 11580 action against NAC. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
